who: HR operations leaders in mid-sized tech companies using BambooHR
offer: For HR operations leaders in mid-sized tech companies using BambooHR processing 50–100 employees, inefficient data analysis causes poor retention strategies. We provide actionable insights instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem: Inability to effectively analyze employee data for strategic decision-making.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations leaders
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR leaders with demo video
Community forums for HR operations leaders sharing tools
try_it: Let users try data aggregation and trend identification on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
